---
title: "Projects"
---

Here's a list of projects I've worked on in the past. 

*(Work in progress)*

## Projects related to Reinforcement Learning

### [RL-basketball](Projects/RL-basketball.html)
Reinforcement learning agent learns to shoot three-pointers.

***
### [RL-blockavoidinggame](Projects/RL-blockavoidinggame.html)
DQN on a simple block avoiding game.

***
### [RL-multiplayershootinggame]()

***
## Projects in Python

### [Python-bruh.io]()

*** 
### [Python-zombiesurvivalgame]()

*** 
### [Python-blockjumpinggame]()

*** 
### [Python-todolist]()

***
### [Python-towerdefense]()

***
### [Python-ataribreakout]()

***
## Projects related to Natural Language Processing

### [NLP-sentimentanalysis]()

***
### [NLP-seq2seqchatbot]()

***
## Projects related to Computer Vision

### [FR-simplefacerecognition]()
